$curated: Per-state BODY composition for the dashboard — the set of keyed nodes that dashboard_screen.dart renders IN EACH STATE (shell chrome appbar/notifications/quick-review/screen excluded; it is shell-owned, not state-driven by the screen body). This is the layer that catches state-composition drift the set-level key gate (fe_node_usage) cannot: a node rendered in a state the kit OMITS (e.g. the goal/streak/mastered cards leaking into the minimal empty state). The widget test (dashboard_states_test.dart) pumps each state and asserts the FE body renders EXACTLY this set — anything extra is THỪA, anything absent is THIẾU. Verified by hand against Dashboard.jsx; auto-derivation (parse the kit's `if (state === 'x')` branches, or reconstruct from export_specs' per-state spec diffs) is the future replacement, like slots.json → gen_bindings.
